content:
Testing the creation of a new retro-styled website. I'm building it entirely from scratch using HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS.

The aesthetic is meant to be a blend of early 2000s forums and a terminal interface.

Update: Music Player

I finally got the YouTube API working inside the 1x1 invisible iframe!

It took some tinkering to figure out the autoplay restrictions, but changing the load state fixed the random background playing.
It works beautifully now, just need to figure out the forum layout.
Next step is organizing my old writings into this new format.
